title: Assistant Store Manager - Starbucks India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Starbucks India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Starbucks India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Starbucks India:
Starbucks India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
